Localization.Description: A command and control channel is used through Active Directory

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} used a CC covert channel through AD by editing compromised LDAP attribute {object.property} on AD host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} used a CC covert channel through AD by repeatedly editing the same LDAP attribute {object.property} on AD host {event_src.host}
